title: callista chrysantha
intro: Callista chrysantha, also known as the Mexican gold poppy, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and parts of the southwestern United States. The plant is known for its bright yellow and orange flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Callista chrysantha include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular natural remedy in folk medicine.
